'''favumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xoomii|xoomii]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xoomii|xoomii]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| favumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fævimith|fævimith]] || [[word:fævimij|fævimij]] || [[word:fævimish|fævimish]] || [[word:fævimi|fævimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:favuvumuth|favuvumuth]] || [[word:favuvumuj|favuvumuj]] || [[word:favuvumush|favuvumush]] || [[word:favuvumu|favuvumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:favumuth|favumuth]] || [[word:favumuj|favumuj]] || [[word:favumush|favumush]] || [[word:favumu|favumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:favufmuth|favufmuth]] || [[word:favufmuj|favufmuj]] || [[word:favufmush|favufmush]] || [[word:favufmuf|favufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:favumuthu|favumuthu]] || [[word:favumuju|favumuju]] || [[word:favumushu|favumushu]] || [[word:favumuku|favumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:favumuth|favumuth]] || [[word:favumuj|favumuj]] || [[word:favumush|favumush]] || [[word:favumu|favumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:favumuthul|favumuthul]] || [[word:favumujul|favumujul]] || [[word:favumushul|favumushul]] || [[word:favumukul|favumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:favumuthuthu|favumuthuthu]] || [[word:favumujuju|favumujuju]] || [[word:favumushushu|favumushushu]] || [[word:favumuku|favumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:favumuthun|favumuthun]] || [[word:favumujun|favumujun]] || [[word:favumushun|favumushun]] || [[word:favumukun|favumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:favumuthuoro|favumuthuoro]] || [[word:favumujuoro|favumujuoro]] || [[word:favumushuoro|favumushuoro]] || [[word:favumukuoro|favumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
